documents.content:
STM32F4xx Microcontroller Datasheet
1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
            The STM32F405xx and STM32F407xx are based on the high-performance
            ARM Cortex-M4 32-bit RISC core operating at a frequency of up to 168 MHz.

1. PRODUCT OVERVIEW
            The STM32F405xx and STM32F407xx are based on the high-performance
            ARM Cortex-M4 32-bit RISC core operating at a frequency of up to 168 MHz.
2. FEATURES
            - Core: ARM Cortex-M4 with FPU, up to 168 MHz
            - Flash: Up to 1 MB
            - SRAM: Up to 192 KB
            - ADC: 12-bit, 16 channels, up to 2.4 MSPS
            - DAC: 12-bit, 2 channels
            - Timers: Up to 14 timers
            - Communication: USART, SPI, I2C, CAN, USB OTG
            - Operating Voltage: 1.8V to 3.6V
            - Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C

2. FEATURES
            - Core: ARM Cortex-M4 with FPU, up to 168 MHz
            - Flash: Up to 1 MB
            - SRAM: Up to 192 KB
            - ADC: 12-bit, 16 channels, up to 2.4 MSPS
            - DAC: 12-bit, 2 channels
            - Timers: Up to 14 timers
            - Communication: USART, SPI, I2C, CAN, USB OTG
            - Operating Voltage: 1.8V to 3.6V
            - Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C
3. PIN DEFINITIONS
            VDD: Power supply (1.8V-3.6V)
            VSS: Ground
            PA0-PA15: Port A pins
            PB0-PB15: Port B pins
            PC0-PC15: Port C pins
            VDDA: Analog supply
            VSSA: Analog ground
            BOOT0: Boot selection
            NRST: Reset pin (active low)

3. PIN DEFINITIONS
            VDD: Power supply (1.8V-3.6V)
            VSS: Ground
            PA0-PA15: Port A pins
            PB0-PB15: Port B pins
            PC0-PC15: Port C pins
            VDDA: Analog supply
            VSSA: Analog ground
            BOOT0: Boot selection
            NRST: Reset pin (active low)
4. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Resolution: 12-bit (0-4095)
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2.4 MSPS
            Input Channels: 16 external + 2 internal
            Reference Voltage: VREF+ (typically 3.3V)
            Conversion Time: 12 cycles for 12-bit

4. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Resolution: 12-bit (0-4095)
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2.4 MSPS
            Input Channels: 16 external + 2 internal
            Reference Voltage: VREF+ (typically 3.3V)
            Conversion Time: 12 cycles for 12-bit
5. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Output Current: 25 mA per pin (max)
            Total Current: 120 mA per port (max)
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to VDD+0.3V
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 40 kΩ typical

5. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Output Current: 25 mA per pin (max)
            Total Current: 120 mA per port (max)
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to VDD+0.3V
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 40 kΩ typical
6. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Standard (100 kHz), Fast (400 kHz)
            Address: 7-bit or 10-bit
            Noise Filter: Built-in 50ns filter
            Clock Stretching: Supported

6. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Standard (100 kHz), Fast (400 kHz)
            Address: 7-bit or 10-bit
            Noise Filter: Built-in 50ns filter
            Clock Stretching: Supported
7. UART SPECIFICATIONS
            Baud Rate: Up to 10.5 Mbps
            Data Bits: 8 or 9
            Stop Bits: 1 or 2
            Parity: None, Even, Odd
            Flow Control: RTS/CTS optional

7. UART SPECIFICATIONS
            Baud Rate: Up to 10.5 Mbps
            Data Bits: 8 or 9
            Stop Bits: 1 or 2
            Parity: None, Even, Odd
            Flow Control: RTS/CTS optional
8. POWER CONSUMPTION
            Run Mode: 100 mA @ 168 MHz
            Sleep Mode: 30 mA
            Stop Mode: 100 μA
            Standby Mode: 2 μA

8. POWER CONSUMPTION
            Run Mode: 100 mA @ 168 MHz
            Sleep Mode: 30 mA
            Stop Mode: 100 μA
            Standby Mode: 2 μA
9. MEMORY MAP
            0x08000000 - 0x08100000: Flash (1 MB)
            0x20000000 - 0x20030000: SRAM (192 KB)
            0x40020000 - 0x40020400: APB1 Peripherals
            0x40010000 - 0x40010400: APB2 Peripherals

9. MEMORY MAP
            0x08000000 - 0x08100000: Flash (1 MB)
            0x20000000 - 0x20030000: SRAM (192 KB)
            0x40020000 - 0x40020400: APB1 Peripherals
            0x40010000 - 0x40010400: APB2 Peripherals
10. CLOCK CONFIGURATION
            HSI: 16 MHz internal RC
            HSE: 4-26 MHz external crystal
            PLL: Up to 168 MHz output

ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet
1. OVERVIEW
            The ESP32 is a low-power system on a chip microcontrollers
            with integrated Wi-Fi and dual-mode Bluetooth.
2. SPECIFICATIONS
            Processor: Dual-core Xtensa LX6, up to 240 MHz
            SRAM: 520 KB
            Flash: 4 MB (external)
            WiFi: 802.11 b/g/n
            Bluetooth: BLE 4.2
            GPIO: 34 pins
            Operating Voltage: 2.2V to 3.6V
            Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C

2. SPECIFICATIONS
            Processor: Dual-core Xtensa LX6, up to 240 MHz
            SRAM: 520 KB
            Flash: 4 MB (external)
            WiFi: 802.11 b/g/n
            Bluetooth: BLE 4.2
            GPIO: 34 pins
            Operating Voltage: 2.2V to 3.6V
            Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C
3. POWER SPECIFICATIONS
            Supply Voltage: 3.3V
            Current Consumption:
            - WiFi TX: 240 mA (peak)
            - WiFi RX: 95 mA
            - Bluetooth TX: 130 mA
            - Light Sleep: 0.8 mA
            - Deep Sleep: 10 μA

3. POWER SPECIFICATIONS
            Supply Voltage: 3.3V
            Current Consumption:
            - WiFi TX: 240 mA (peak)
            - WiFi RX: 95 mA
            - Bluetooth TX: 130 mA
            - Light Sleep: 0.8 mA
            - Deep Sleep: 10 μA
4. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Number of GPIOs: 34
            Output Current: 40 mA (max per pin)
            Total Current: 400 mA (VDD pins)
            Input Voltage: 0V to 3.3V (5V tolerant with strap)
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 45 kΩ typical

4. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Number of GPIOs: 34
            Output Current: 40 mA (max per pin)
            Total Current: 400 mA (VDD pins)
            Input Voltage: 0V to 3.3V (5V tolerant with strap)
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 45 kΩ typical
5. WiFi SPECIFICATIONS
            Standard: 802.11 b/g/n
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            Channels: 13 (CN), 11 (US)
            TX Power: +20 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -98 dBm

5. WiFi SPECIFICATIONS
            Standard: 802.11 b/g/n
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            Channels: 13 (CN), 11 (US)
            TX Power: +20 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -98 dBm
6. BLUETOOTH SPECIFICATIONS
            Version: BLE 4.2
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            TX Power: +12 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -97 dBm

6. BLUETOOTH SPECIFICATIONS
            Version: BLE 4.2
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            TX Power: +12 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -97 dBm
7. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 18 (2 at 1.8V, 16 at 3.3V)
            Resolution: 12-bit
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2 MSPS
            Reference: VDD (3.3V)
            Accuracy: ±1%
8. DAC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 2
            Resolution: 8-bit
            Output Range: 0 to VDD

8. DAC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 2
            Resolution: 8-bit
            Output Range: 0 to VDD
9. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Up to 400 kHz
            Address Range: 0x00-0x7F
            pins: GPIO21 (SDA), GPIO22 (SCL)
10. SPI SPECIFICATIONS
            Max Speed: 80 MHz
            CS Pins: 6
            Data Width: 1-32 bits
            Mode: 0-3

LM358 Dual Operational Amplifier Datasheet
1. DESCRIPTION
            The LM358 consists of two independent, high-gain,
            internal frequency-compensated operational amplifiers.
2. ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM RATINGS
            Supply Voltage: 32V (single), ±16V (dual)
            Differential Input Voltage: 32V
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to 32V
            Output Short-Circuit Duration: Indefinite
            Power Dissipation: 830 mW

2. ABSOLUTE MAXIMUM RATINGS
            Supply Voltage: 32V (single), ±16V (dual)
            Differential Input Voltage: 32V
            Input Voltage: -0.3V to 32V
            Output Short-Circuit Duration: Indefinite
            Power Dissipation: 830 mW
3. ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS
            Supply Voltage: 3V to 32V (single)
            Quiescent Current: 500 μA (typical)
            Input Bias Current: 45 nA (typical)
            Input Offset Voltage: 3 mV (max)
            Input Offset Current: 5 nA (max)

3. ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS
            Supply Voltage: 3V to 32V (single)
            Quiescent Current: 500 μA (typical)
            Input Bias Current: 45 nA (typical)
            Input Offset Voltage: 3 mV (max)
            Input Offset Current: 5 nA (max)
4. PERFORMANCE
            Open-Loop Gain: 100 dB (typical)
            Gain-Bandwidth Product: 700 kHz
            Slew Rate: 0.3 V/μs
            Input Impedance: 1 MΩ
            Output Impedance: 100 Ω

4. PERFORMANCE
            Open-Loop Gain: 100 dB (typical)
            Gain-Bandwidth Product: 700 kHz
            Slew Rate: 0.3 V/μs
            Input Impedance: 1 MΩ
            Output Impedance: 100 Ω
5. PIN CONFIGURATION
            Pin 1: Output A
            Pin 2: Inverting Input A (-)
            Pin 3: Non-inverting Input A (+)
            Pin 4: VCC (Ground for single supply)
            Pin 5: Non-inverting Input B (+)
            Pin 6: Inverting Input B (-)
            Pin 7: Output B
            Pin 8: VCC+ (Positive supply)

5. PIN CONFIGURATION
            Pin 1: Output A
            Pin 2: Inverting Input A (-)
            Pin 3: Non-inverting Input A (+)
            Pin 4: VCC (Ground for single supply)
            Pin 5: Non-inverting Input B (+)
            Pin 6: Inverting Input B (-)
            Pin 7: Output B
            Pin 8: VCC+ (Positive supply)
6. APPLICATIONS
            - Signal conditioning
            - Active filters
            - Buffers
            - Comparators
            - Voltage followers
            - Summing amplifiers

6. APPLICATIONS
            - Signal conditioning
            - Active filters
            - Buffers
            - Comparators
            - Voltage followers
            - Summing amplifiers
7. TYPICAL CIRCUITS
            Non-inverting Amplifier: Gain = 1 + Rf/Rg
            Inverting Amplifier: Gain = -Rf/Rg
            Voltage Follower: Gain = 1
